research_question: Which seasons had the closest title race?
explanation: Computed from tracking; final_gap from playoff final table in playoff seasons.

research_question: In which round was the championship mathematically decided?
explanation: gap > remaining_rounds*3, or final round (ties resolved by tiebreaker).

research_question: How many teams were still in the title race near the end?
explanation: Teams within 7 points of leader at checkpoint (5 rounds before end).

research_question: How many lead changes occurred after round 10?
explanation: Leader changes after global round 10; includes championship playoff when tracking available.

research_question: How stable was the champion throughout the season?
explanation: Rounds as leader vs eventual champion; full title timeline in playoff seasons.

research_question: How many teams were fighting relegation near the end?
explanation: Survival line = first relegation spot; abs(points-survival)<=6, rank_snap>=N-6; full-season incl. playoff.

research_question: How volatile was the relegation zone?
explanation: Notebook M4: half symmetric-diff zone changes on regular + relegation playoff timeline.

research_question: In which round was relegation mathematically decided?
recommended_next_step: Verify per-team rows in metric2 CSV.

research_question: How close was the relegation battle?
explanation: Composite score; late_contenders uses full-season teams_in_relegation_race_last_5_rounds.

research_question: Is there home advantage in Ligat Ha'Al?
How balanced was the league overall?
explanation: Std, gap, Gini from final table; Gini reused from gini_by_season.csv.

research_question: How different were playoffs compared to the regular season?
explanation: Regular from TM matches; playoff from betexplorer when needed.

research_question: Does Saturday attendance differ from non-Saturday attendance?
explanation: Saturday vs non-Saturday from match attendance (15 seasons with coverage >= 60%).
Attendance analysis will be added after match-level attendance data is fully collected and validated.

research_question: Do competitive seasons attract higher attendance?
explanation: average_match_attendance_valid filled for seasons with sufficient attendance coverage.

research_question: Do top-of-table matches attract higher attendance?
explanation: Attendance analysis will be added after match-level attendance data is fully collected and validated.
